message:
feat(io): add copy operations and stream splitting [asupersync-bbn]

Implements copy(), copy_buf(), copy_with_progress(), and copy_bidirectional()
for async I/O in src/io/copy.rs. Also adds SplitStream, ReadHalf, WriteHalf
for splitting duplex streams safely using RefCell in src/io/split.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
